# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] UI/UX

## Testing

- [ ] Ran the Flask app locally
- [ ] Tested basic arithmetic
- [ ] Tested scientific functions
- [ ] Tested invalid input handling
- [ ] Checked browser console for errors

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes.

## Notes

Add anything reviewers should know.
